name: Chevening Scholarships
description: UK government's global scholarship programme for future leaders to pursue one-year master's degrees. Covers tuition, living expenses, flights, and additional allowances. Applicants must have work experience and leadership potential.
requirements: Return to home country for 2 years

name: Rhodes Scholarships
description: Oldest and most prestigious international scholarship programme for study at Oxford University. Covers all costs including tuition, living stipend, and travel. Seeks exceptional all-round students with academic excellence, leadership, and commitment to service.
requirements: Bachelor's degree with high academic achievement

name: Marshall Scholarships
description: Finances young Americans of high ability to study for a degree in the UK. Covers university fees, living expenses, travel, and thesis grant. Limited to US citizens with outstanding academic merit and leadership potential.
requirements: Graduated from US college within 3 years

name: Commonwealth Scholarships
description: For students from low and middle-income Commonwealth countries to pursue master's and PhD studies. Covers airfare, tuition, and living allowance. Aims to support development and cannot afford to study in UK otherwise.
requirements: Return to home country after studies

name: Cambridge International Scholarships
description: Full-cost scholarships for international PhD students at Cambridge University. Covers full tuition, maintenance allowance, and flights. Highly competitive and awarded based on academic excellence and research potential.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarships
description: Prestigious scholarship for outstanding applicants from outside UK to pursue full-time postgraduate degree at Cambridge. Covers full cost of study including tuition, maintenance, flights, and family allowance. Seeks scholars with leadership potential and commitment to improving lives of others.
requirements: Commitment to improving lives of others

name: Clarendon Fund Scholarships
description: Oxford's largest graduate scholarship scheme offering around 140 scholarships annually. Covers tuition and provides generous living allowance. Awarded based on academic excellence and potential across all subjects.

name: GREAT Scholarships
description: Provides £10,000 towards tuition fees for one-year postgraduate courses. Available to students from 18 countries across various UK universities and subjects. Aimed at supporting students who would not otherwise be able to study in UK.

name: Edinburgh Global Research Scholarship
description: Covers the difference between tuition fees for international and UK students for PhD programmes. Approximately 30 awards available annually. Competitive awards based on academic merit.

name: Imperial College PhD Scholarships
description: Various fully-funded PhD scholarships across science, engineering, medicine and business. Covers full tuition fees and annual stipend for living costs. Highly competitive and discipline-specific.
requirements: First class or upper second class degree

name: Reach Oxford Scholarships
description: For students from low-income countries who cannot study for a degree in their own country. Covers course fees, living expenses, and one return airfare per year. For undergraduate students only.
requirements: Cannot afford higher education in home country

name: Denys Holland Scholarship
description: For UK students with financial difficulties to study at UCL. Provides £9,000 per year for duration of undergraduate degree. Based on financial need and academic merit.

name: Think Big Scholarships
description: For international students starting undergraduate or postgraduate taught degree. Awards range from £6,500 to £20,000. Based on academic excellence and personal statement.

name: Warwick Chancellor's International Scholarships
description: Full tuition fee scholarships for international students pursuing postgraduate studies. Highly competitive with around 30 awards annually. Based on academic excellence and potential.

name: Vice-Chancellor's Scholarships for Research Excellence
description: Prestigious scholarships for outstanding international PhD students. Covers full tuition fees and maintenance stipend. Awarded across all research areas based on academic excellence.
requirements: First class or high upper second class degree

name: Developing Solutions Scholarships
description: For students from Africa, India or developing Commonwealth countries. Covers 100% or 50% of tuition fees for master's courses. Focus on applicants who want to contribute to development of their home country.

name: Glasgow Refugee, Asylum Seeker and Humanitarian Protection Scholarship
description: For students with refugee status or humanitarian protection. Provides tuition fee waiver and living cost support. Demonstrates Glasgow's commitment to supporting displaced students.
requirements: Refugee status or asylum seeker or humanitarian protection

name: King's International Scholarships
description: Merit-based awards for international undergraduate students. Provides £10,000 per year for duration of degree. Automatic consideration for students who apply by deadline.

name: Edinburgh Global Undergraduate Mathematics Scholarships
description: For international students studying Mathematics. Provides £5,000 per year for up to four years. Based on academic merit and application strength.
requirements: Offer to study Mathematics at Edinburgh

name: Weidenfeld-Hoffmann Scholarships and Leadership Programme
description: For students from transition and emerging economies to study at Oxford. Covers full costs including fees, living expenses and flights. Includes leadership programme and focuses on future leaders who will return home.

name: LSE Graduate Support Scheme
description: Need-based funding for master's students demonstrating financial need. Awards vary from partial to full tuition coverage. Automatic consideration for those who complete financial assessment.

name: Durham University Scholarships
description: Range of scholarships for international undergraduate students. Awards typically £9,000 per year. Based on academic excellence and in some cases leadership or sporting achievement.
requirements: Meet specific criteria for each scholarship

name: Queen Mary Westfield Scholarships
description: For international students pursuing taught master's programmes. Provides full or partial tuition fee waiver. Awarded on basis of academic merit.
requirements: Offer for master's programme at Queen Mary

name: Scotland's Saltire Scholarships
description: For students from Canada, China, India, Japan, Pakistan, and USA studying in Scotland. Provides £8,000 for one year of full-time master's study. Focus on science, technology, creative industries, healthcare and medical sciences, and renewable energy.
requirements: Acceptance to Scottish university master's programme

name: University of Sheffield Faculty Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students across various faculties. Awards typically 50% of tuition fees. Competitive and based on academic achievement.

name: Birmingham Global Masters Scholarships
description: For high-achieving international students starting master's programmes. Awards range from £10,000 to full tuition fees. Automatic consideration with application.
requirements: Offer from Birmingham for master's programme

name: Exeter Global Excellence Scholarships
description: For outstanding international undergraduate students. Provides up to £10,000 per year. Awarded based on academic achievement and potential contribution to university community.

name: Leeds International Undergraduate Excellence Scholarship
description: For high-achieving international students starting undergraduate degrees. Provides £5,000 per year for duration of degree. Automatic consideration for those who meet criteria.

name: York Master's Scholarships
description: Range of scholarships for international master's students. Awards typically 25-50% of tuition fees. Based on academic merit and awarded across all subject areas.

name: Southampton Doctoral College Studentships
description: Fully-funded PhD positions across multiple research areas. Covers full tuition fees and provides annual stipend. Competitive awards based on academic excellence and research proposal quality.
requirements: First class or high 2:1 undergraduate degree

name: Fulbright U.S. Student Program
description: Provides grants for individually designed study/research projects or for English Teaching Assistant Programs. Covers travel, living stipend, health insurance, and tuition in some cases. Open to U.S. citizens for study abroad in over 140 countries.
requirements: Bachelor's degree by award start date

name: Knight-Hennessy Scholars
description: Covers full cost of attending any graduate degree program at Stanford including tuition, stipend, and travel. Seeks future global leaders with demonstrated independence of thought and purposeful leadership. Open to applicants worldwide.
requirements: Applying to or enrolled in Stanford graduate program

name: Schwarzman Scholars
description: One-year master's degree program at Tsinghua University in Beijing. Covers tuition, room and board, travel, and provides stipend. Designed to prepare next generation of global leaders with understanding of China.

name: Yale World Fellows Program
description: Four-month residential fellowship at Yale for emerging global leaders. Provides stipend, housing, health insurance, and travel. Fellows audit courses, engage with Yale community, and develop leadership projects.

name: Rhodes Scholarship
description: World's oldest graduate scholarship covering study at University of Oxford. Provides full tuition, living stipend, travel costs, and health insurance. Seeks outstanding students with academic excellence, character, leadership, and commitment to service.

name: Marshall Scholarship
description: Finances up to two years of graduate study at any UK institution. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and thesis grant. Aims to strengthen US-UK relationship through education of future American leaders.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
description: Covers full cost of studying at University of Cambridge including tuition, maintenance allowance, travel costs, and family allowance. Seeks outstanding applicants with commitment to improving lives of others. Open to international students outside UK.

name: Hubert H. Humphrey Fellowship Program
description: Ten-month non-degree program for experienced professionals from designated countries. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and health insurance. Focuses on professional development through coursework and leadership development.

name: AAUW International Fellowships
description: Supports women pursuing full-time graduate or postdoctoral study in the United States. Awards $18,000-$30,000 for graduate study and $50,000 for postdoctoral research. Open to women who are not U.S. citizens or permanent residents.

name: American Scandinavian Foundation Fellowship
description: Funds research or study in Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Norway, or Sweden. Awards up to $23,000 for one year. Priority given to candidates at PhD level or candidates who have not previously received ASF funding.

name: Paul & Daisy Soros Fellowships for New Americans
description: Supports New Americans (immigrants and children of immigrants) pursuing graduate education in the United States. Provides $90,000 over two years for tuition and living expenses. Recognizes exceptional contributions to U.S. society.

name: Boren Fellowships
description: Provides funding for U.S. graduate students to study abroad in regions critical to U.S. interests. Awards up to $25,000 for overseas study. Recipients commit to working in federal government for at least one year.

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
description: Enables graduate students, young professionals and artists from abroad to study and conduct research in the United States. Covers tuition, travel, health insurance, and living stipend. Available in over 155 countries.

name: Mitchell Scholarship
description: One year of postgraduate study in Ireland or Northern Ireland. Covers tuition, housing, living expenses, and travel. Designed to introduce future American leaders to the island of Ireland and strengthen US-Ireland relations.

name: Rotary Peace Fellowship
description: Covers tuition, fees, room and board for master's degree or professional certificate in peace and conflict resolution. Programs at Rotary Peace Centers worldwide. Seeks leaders committed to peace and conflict resolution.

name: Joint Japan World Bank Graduate Scholarship
description: Provides scholarships for students from developing countries to pursue master's degrees in development-related fields. Covers travel, tuition, living expenses, health insurance, and return airfare. Requires return to home country after studies.

name: Chevening Scholarships
description: UK government's global scholarship program for one-year master's degrees in the UK. Covers tuition, travel, living expenses. Seeks future leaders, decision-makers, and opinion formers from around the world.

name: Pickering Foreign Affairs Fellowship
description: Provides financial support up to $85,000 over two years for graduate study leading to Foreign Service career. Includes academic expenses, summer internships, and domestic travel. Recipients commit to 5 years of Foreign Service.

name: Rangel Graduate Fellowship
description: Provides up to $82,000 over two years for master's degree study in preparation for Foreign Service career. Includes summer internships, mentoring, and professional development. Recipients commit to minimum 5 years of Foreign Service.

name: Ford Foundation Fellowship
description: Supports underrepresented minorities pursuing PhD or postdoctoral research. Provides three years of support for predoctoral fellows ($27,000 stipend plus tuition). Seeks to increase diversity of nation's college and university faculties.

name: DAAD Graduate Scholarship
description: Provides scholarships for graduate study, research, or internships in Germany. Monthly stipend of €934 for graduates plus travel allowance and health insurance. Promotes academic exchange between Germany and other countries.

name: Gilman International Scholarship
description: Provides awards for U.S. undergraduate students with financial need to study or intern abroad. Awards up to $8,000 for study and research, plus additional $3,000 for critical need languages. Increases study abroad access for underrepresented students.

name: National Science Foundation Graduate Research Fellowship
description: Three years of financial support for graduate study in STEM fields. Provides $37,000 annual stipend plus $12,000 cost of education allowance to institution. Prestigious fellowship supporting outstanding graduate students in NSF-supported disciplines.

name: Critical Language Scholarship
description: Fully-funded summer overseas language and cultural immersion program for American students. Covers tuition, room and board, international airfare, and cultural activities. Focuses on 15 critical languages essential to America's engagement with the world.

name: Jack Kent Cooke Graduate Arts Award
description: Supports exceptionally promising students pursuing graduate degrees in arts fields. Provides up to $50,000 per year for up to three years. Covers tuition, living expenses, books, and fees for study at accredited institutions.

name: Truman Scholarship
description: Provides $30,000 for graduate study to college juniors committed to careers in public service. Supports students who will be change agents and pursue graduate degrees preparing them for leadership. Includes leadership training and career counseling.

name: Google Lime Scholarship
description: Awards students with disabilities pursuing degrees in computer science or related fields. Provides $10,000 for undergraduate students and $5,000 for graduate students. Recipients also invited to Google Scholars' Retreat.

name: P.E.O. International Peace Scholarship
description: Provides scholarships for international women to pursue graduate study in the United States or Canada. Awards up to $12,500 annually. Seeks women from countries other than U.S. or Canada who will return home to make positive impact.

name: Goldwater Scholarship
description: Awards sophomores and juniors pursuing research careers in natural sciences, mathematics, and engineering. Provides up to $7,500 per academic year. Most prestigious undergraduate scholarship in STEM fields, often pathway to graduate fellowships.

name: Stanford Knight-Hennessy Scholars
description: Multi-year funding for graduate study at Stanford covering tuition and associated fees plus a stipend for living and academic expenses. Develops a multidisciplinary and multicultural community of future global leaders. Open to all graduate programs at Stanford.

name: DAAD Study Scholarships for Graduates
description: Supports international graduates pursuing a master's degree at German universities. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel costs. Open to all academic fields.
requirements: Bachelor's degree completed within last 6 years

name: DAAD Doctoral Research Grants
description: Provides funding for doctoral candidates to conduct research at German universities or research institutes. Includes monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel allowance. Duration typically 1-4 years.

name: Heinrich Böll Foundation Scholarship
description: Supports international students pursuing undergraduate, graduate, or doctoral degrees in Germany who demonstrate commitment to green politics and social justice. Provides monthly stipend and covers tuition fees.

name: Konrad Adenauer Stiftung Scholarship
description: Awards scholarships to international students for bachelor's, master's, or doctoral studies in Germany. Candidates should demonstrate Christian-democratic values and civic engagement. Includes monthly stipend and additional benefits.

name: Friedrich Ebert Stiftung Scholarship
description: Supports international students committed to social democratic values pursuing degrees in Germany. Covers monthly stipend, tuition fees, and provides access to extensive network and seminars.

name: Friedrich Naumann Foundation Scholarship
description: Awards scholarships to students and doctoral candidates who support liberal values and show strong academic performance. Provides financial support and access to seminars and liberal network in Germany.

name: Rosa Luxemburg Stiftung Scholarship
description: Supports international students and doctoral candidates in Germany who are committed to left-wing politics and social justice. Includes monthly stipend and participation in educational programs.

name: Deutschlandstipendium (Germany Scholarship)
description: Merit-based scholarship for students at German universities, regardless of nationality. Provides €300 per month for at least two semesters. Half funded by private sponsors, half by federal government.

name: DAAD EPOS Scholarships
description: Development-related postgraduate courses scholarship for students from developing countries. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel costs for specific master's programs in Germany.

name: Helmholtz International Graduate School
description: Doctoral positions at Germany's largest scientific organization focusing on research in energy, earth, health, aeronautics, matter, and key technologies. Provides competitive salary and research facilities.

name: Max Planck Society PhD Positions
description: Doctoral research positions at Max Planck Institutes across Germany in natural sciences, life sciences, social sciences, and humanities. Offers excellent research infrastructure and international environment.

name: ÖAD Ernst Mach Grant Worldwide
provider: OeAD (Austrian Agency for Education and Internationalisation)
description: Short-term research grant for international doctoral candidates and postdocs to conduct research at Austrian universities. Provides monthly stipend for 1-6 months.

name: ÖAD Scholarship for International Students
description: Various scholarship programs for international students to study at Austrian universities. Monthly stipends vary by program level and duration ranges from one semester to full degree.

name: ETH Zurich Excellence Scholarship & Opportunity Programme
description: Merit-based scholarship for outstanding international students admitted to ETH Zurich master's programs. Covers living expenses and tuition fees for full duration of master's program.
requirements: Admission to ETH Zurich master's program

name: EPFL Excellence Fellowships
description: Competitive fellowship for outstanding international students admitted to EPFL master's programs. Provides financial support covering living expenses for the duration of studies.

name: Swiss Government Excellence Scholarships
description: Research scholarships for international doctoral students and postdocs to conduct research at Swiss universities. Covers monthly stipend, tuition fees, health insurance, and housing allowance.

name: IST Austria PhD Program
provider: Institute of Science and Technology Austria
description: Fully-funded doctoral program in natural sciences, mathematics, and computer science. Provides competitive salary, no tuition fees, and access to state-of-the-art research facilities near Vienna.
requirements: Bachelor's or master's degree in relevant field

name: University of Vienna Doctoral Academy
description: Structured doctoral programs with employment contracts for PhD candidates at University of Vienna. Provides salary, social security, and structured training across various disciplines.

name: ETH Zurich Doctoral Fellowships
description: Doctoral positions at ETH Zurich with employment contracts. PhD candidates receive competitive salary and benefits while conducting research in engineering, natural sciences, mathematics, or architecture.

name: TU Munich PhD Positions
description: Doctoral positions with employment contracts at one of Germany's top technical universities. Covers salary, social benefits, and access to excellent research infrastructure.

name: Humboldt Research Fellowship for Postdoctoral Researchers
description: Prestigious fellowship for highly qualified postdoctoral researchers from abroad to conduct research in Germany. Provides monthly stipend and additional benefits for 6-24 months.

name: SNSF International PhD Fellowships
description: Supports doctoral research within SNSF-funded projects at Swiss research institutions. Provides employment contract with full salary and social benefits for duration of PhD research.

name: DAAD STIBET Scholarships
description: Financial aid program for international students already studying at German universities facing unexpected financial difficulties. Short-term support and completion grants available through individual universities.

name: Hanns Seidel Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarships for international students and doctoral candidates in Germany who share Christian-social values. Includes monthly stipend, material allowance, and participation in educational programs.

name: University of Zurich PhD Programs
description: Doctoral positions with employment contracts across various faculties. PhD candidates receive competitive Swiss salary and full social benefits while conducting research.

name: APART Fellowship of the Austrian Academy of Sciences
description: Postdoctoral fellowship program for young scientists to conduct independent research at Austrian research institutions. Provides generous funding for up to 36 months.

name: Erasmus+ Master Degree Loans
description: Guaranteed student loans for master's degree studies in participating European countries including Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Favorable terms and conditions for repayment.

name: DAAD Helmut Schmidt Scholarships
description: Public Policy and Good Governance scholarships for future leaders from developing countries. Supports master's studies in related fields at selected German universities.

name: Berne University Graduate School of Climate Sciences
description: Doctoral program in climate sciences with full employment contracts. Provides competitive salary and benefits for interdisciplinary climate research.

name: Vienna Biocenter PhD Program
description: International PhD program in molecular life sciences. Fully funded positions with competitive salary, no tuition fees, and world-class research facilities in Vienna.
requirements: Bachelor's or master's in life sciences

name: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship Programme
provider: French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs
description: Targets top international students for master's and PhD programs in French institutions. Covers monthly allowance, travel, health insurance, and cultural activities. Nomination through French higher education institutions required.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees
description: Fully-funded scholarships for international students pursuing integrated master's programs across multiple European countries. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and monthly allowance. Must study in at least two different European countries.
requirements: Study in at least 2 EU countries

name: French Government Scholarship (BGF)
description: Various scholarship programs managed by French embassies for international students. Coverage varies by program and country. Application typically through local Campus France office.
requirements: Apply through Campus France in home country

name: Charpak Scholarship
description: Specifically for Indian students pursuing master's degrees in France. Provides monthly allowance and covers some tuition fees. Named after Nobel Prize winner Georges Charpak.

name: Italian Government Scholarships for Foreign Students
description: Scholarships for international students and researchers to study in Italy. Covers tuition, health insurance, and monthly allowance. Available for various study levels and research periods.

name: Politecnico di Milano Merit-Based Scholarships
description: Gold and Platinum scholarships for high-achieving international students enrolling in MSc programs. Includes tuition waiver and living allowance. Based on academic merit and SAT/GRE scores.

name: University of Bologna Study Grants
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students enrolling in degree programs. Provides tuition waivers and/or monetary grants. Multiple application rounds available.

name: Sapienza University Scholarships
description: Various scholarship opportunities for international students including tuition waivers and living allowances. Based on merit and/or financial need. Multiple programs available throughout the year.

name: Bocconi Merit and Need-Based Awards
description: Prestigious scholarships for undergraduate and graduate students in business and economics. Covers tuition and living expenses based on merit and financial need. Automatic consideration upon application.
requirements: No separate application for some awards

name: Invest Your Talent in Italy
provider: Italian Ministry of Foreign Affairs & Universities
description: Scholarships for international students from select countries to study master's programs in Italy with internship opportunities. Covers tuition, living allowance, and insurance. Includes mandatory internship component.

name: MAEC-AECID Scholarships
provider: Spanish Agency for International Development Cooperation
description: Spanish government scholarships for international students from specific countries, primarily Latin America and Africa. Covers studies, research, and training programs in Spain. Monthly allowance and health insurance included.
requirements: Academic background relevant to study area

name: Fundación Carolina Scholarships
description: Scholarships for Ibero-American students to pursue postgraduate studies and research in Spain. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, travel, and insurance. Focus on fostering ties between Spain and Latin America.

name: Universidad Autónoma de Madrid Excellence Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students enrolling in master's programs. Covers tuition reduction or full waiver. Limited number available for top candidates.

name: la Caixa Foundation Fellowship Programme
description: Highly competitive fellowships for Spanish and Portuguese students to pursue master's or doctoral studies at top European universities. Covers tuition, living expenses, and travel. For studies outside Spain.

name: Barcelona Graduate School of Economics Scholarships
description: Merit-based tuition fellowships and waivers for master's students in economics and data science. Ranges from partial to full tuition coverage. Automatic consideration upon admission.

name: Santander Scholarships
description: Various scholarship and mobility programs offered globally through university partnerships. Supports studies, research, internships, and entrepreneurship. Multiple programs with different deadlines.

name: IE University Scholarships
description: Merit and need-based scholarships for undergraduate and graduate programs in business, law, and technology. Covers partial to significant tuition reduction. Multiple scholarship types available.

name: ESADE Business School Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for MBA and specialized master's programs. Awards based on academic excellence, professional experience, and diversity. Automatic consideration with application.

name: Emile Boutmy Scholarship - Sciences Po
description: For non-EU students admitted to Sciences Po based on academic excellence and profile. Covers tuition and living expenses partially or fully. Named after the university's founder.
requirements: Admission to undergraduate or master's program

name: ENS Paris International Selection
description: Highly selective program for international students to pursue master's at ENS Paris. Provides monthly stipend and accommodation. Students become normaliens with access to all resources.

name: École Polytechnique Excellence Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students in master's programs. Partial tuition waivers and monthly stipends available. Automatic consideration upon admission.

name: HEC Paris MBA Scholarships
description: Merit and diversity-based scholarships for MBA students at one of Europe's top business schools. Awards based on academic excellence, professional achievement, and diversity contribution. Multiple rounds available.

name: Université Paris-Saclay International Master's Scholarships
description: Scholarships for international students enrolling in select master's programs. Covers tuition and monthly allowance. Focus on STEM fields and highly ranked programs.
requirements: Programs taught in English or French

name: Université Grenoble Alpes Foundation Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students in master's programs. Monthly allowance provided for duration of studies. Focus on students from underrepresented regions.

name: Politecnico di Torino Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships and tuition waivers for international students in engineering and architecture master's programs. Multiple scholarship categories available. Based on academic performance.

name: University of Padova Scholarships
description: Scholarships for international students enrolling in bachelor's and master's programs at one of Italy's oldest universities. Covers tuition and living allowance. Merit and need-based options.

name: Universidad Complutense de Madrid Grants
description: Various grant programs for international students including tuition assistance and research grants. Covers undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Multiple funding sources available.
requirements: Spanish language proficiency for some programs

name: Universitat de Barcelona International Scholarships
description: Scholarships for international students pursuing master's degrees. Includes merit-based awards and specific program scholarships. Partial tuition coverage and stipends available.

name: INSA Lyon International Scholarships
description: Scholarships for international students in engineering programs at INSA Lyon. Covers tuition exemptions and monthly allowances. Merit-based selection for undergraduate and graduate levels.

name: University of Milan Excellence Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for high-achieving international students enrolling in master's programs. Covers tuition waiver and living allowance. Automatic consideration upon admission to select programs.
requirements: Admission to University of Milan master's program

name: Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals (SISGP)
description: Full scholarship for master's students from selected countries to study in Sweden. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel grant, and insurance. Targets future leaders and change-makers from eligible countries.

name: Holland Scholarship
provider: Dutch Ministry of Education, Culture and Science
description: One-time scholarship of €5,000 for international students from outside the EEA to study at participating Dutch universities. Meant as contribution towards study costs. Multiple institutions participate in this program.

name: Orange Knowledge Programme (OKP)
description: Full scholarship for professionals from selected countries to pursue short courses or master's programs. Covers tuition, living costs, visa, travel, and insurance. Focused on development cooperation priority countries.

name: Lund University Global Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship covering 25%, 50%, 75%, or 100% of tuition fees for outstanding students from outside EU/EEA. Does not cover living expenses. Selection based on academic excellence.
requirements: Applied to Lund University bachelor's or master's program

name: KTH Tuition Fee Waiver
description: Covers full or partial tuition fees for highly qualified international students admitted to KTH master's programs. Does not include living expenses. Awarded automatically based on academic merit.

name: Danish Government Scholarships
description: Scholarships for highly qualified students from non-EU/EEA countries under cultural agreements. Covers full or partial tuition fee waiver and/or monthly grants. Limited number available annually.
requirements: Citizenship from countries with cultural agreements

name: University of Copenhagen Excellence Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship covering tuition fees and/or living expenses for exceptional international students. Awards vary in amount, with some covering full tuition plus stipend. Highly competitive selection.

name: Aarhus University Scholarship
description: Full or partial tuition waivers for highly qualified non-EU/EEA students admitted to master's programs. Some scholarships also include monthly stipend. Selection based on academic excellence and motivation.

name: Norwegian Quota Scheme
description: Full scholarship for students from developing countries in the Global South. Covers tuition, living expenses, and travel costs. Aims to strengthen educational capacity in development countries through education exchange.

name: University of Oslo International Summer School Scholarship
description: Partial scholarships for international students to attend summer courses at UiO. Covers tuition and some living costs for 6-8 week programs. Open to undergraduate and graduate students worldwide.

name: Uppsala University IPK Scholarships
description: Covers tuition fees for outstanding students from countries outside EU/EEA required to pay fees. Several scholarship programs available with different coverage levels. Does not cover living expenses.

name: Stockholm University Scholarship Scheme
description: Tuition fee reductions for high-achieving international students. Awards cover partial or full tuition fees but not living costs. Selection based on academic excellence and application quality.

name: Chalmers IPOET Scholarships
description: International Postgraduate Opportunity for Excellence Scholarships cover 75% of tuition fees for top-ranked master's applicants. Renewable yearly with satisfactory progress. Does not include living expenses.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees
description: Full scholarships for joint master's programs delivered by consortia of European universities, including Nordic and Benelux institutions. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and monthly allowance. Study in at least two countries.
requirements: Not resided in EU for 12+ months

name: University of Twente Scholarship (UTS)
description: Scholarships ranging from €3,000-€25,000 per year for excellent non-EU students. Awards based on academic excellence and motivation. Can cover partial or full tuition plus living expenses for top candidates.

name: Radboud Scholarship Programme
description: Full scholarships for talented non-EEA students covering tuition, living expenses, visa, insurance, and liability costs. Highly selective program seeking excellent students who will contribute to university diversity.

name: Amsterdam Excellence Scholarships (AES)
description: Full scholarship covering tuition, living expenses, visa, and insurance for outstanding international students. Awarded to exceptionally talented students across various disciplines. Highly competitive.

name: Delft Excellence Scholarship
description: Partial scholarships for excellent international students admitted to TU Delft master's programs. Awards typically cover full or partial tuition. Selection based on academic excellence and motivation.

name: VU Fellowship Programme (VUFP)
description: Merit-based scholarships for excellent students from outside EU/EEA. Awards range from partial to full tuition coverage. Some include living expense stipend. Automatic consideration with application.

name: Leiden University Excellence Scholarship (LExS)
description: Full scholarships covering tuition, living expenses, and visa costs for outstanding non-EU/EEA students. Highly competitive program seeking academically excellent students with leadership potential.

name: Maastricht University Holland-High Potential Scholarship
description: Full scholarship for talented students from outside EU/EEA. Covers tuition, living expenses, visa, insurance, and pre-academic training. Seeks future leaders and high-achieving individuals.
requirements: Applied to UM bachelor's or master's

name: Erasmus University Holland Scholarship
description: One-time reduction of €5,000 in tuition fees for non-EEA students. Part of the national Holland Scholarship programme. Limited number available through participating faculties.

name: Wageningen University & Research Scholarship
description: Full scholarships covering tuition and living expenses for excellent students from outside EU/EEA. Focuses on students interested in healthy food, living environment, and sustainable development. Highly competitive.

name: Ghent University BOF Scholarships
description: Special Research Fund scholarships for international students pursuing master's programs. Awards provide tuition waivers or living expense stipends. Available for selected programs and nationalities.

name: KU Leuven Scholarship Office Programmes
description: Various scholarships for excellent international students including tuition waivers and stipends. Multiple programs available based on region, field of study, and merit. Varies by faculty and program.

name: VLIR-UOS Scholarships
description: Full scholarships for students from selected developing countries to pursue master's programs at Flemish universities. Covers tuition, travel, living allowance, and insurance. Focus on development-relevant fields.

name: Gothenburg University Scholarship
description: Merit-based tuition fee reductions for non-EU/EEA students. Awards cover partial or full tuition depending on academic excellence. Does not cover living expenses. Automatic consideration with application.

name: Copenhagen Business School Excellence Scholarships
description: Partial or full tuition waivers for outstanding non-EU/EEA students. Some awards include living expense stipends. Selection based on academic merit, GMAT/GRE scores, and motivation. Highly competitive.

name: Norwegian State Educational Loan Fund (Lånekassen)
description: Educational loan and grant scheme available to some international students studying in Norway. Primarily for Norwegian citizens, but some categories of foreigners are eligible. Combination of loan and grant depending on circumstances.

name: BI Norwegian Business School Scholarships
description: Various merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Awards range from partial to full tuition coverage. Some specific to certain nationalities or programs. Multiple scholarship rounds annually.
requirements: Specific criteria vary by scholarship type

name: MEXT Japanese Government Scholarship (University Students)
provider: Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology
description: Full scholarship for international students to pursue undergraduate studies at Japanese universities. Covers tuition, monthly allowance (117,000 yen), airfare, and no tuition fees. Requires application through Japanese embassy or university.

name: MEXT Japanese Government Scholarship (Research Students)
provider: Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology
description: Graduate scholarship for master's and doctoral students conducting research at Japanese universities. Provides monthly stipend (144,000-145,000 yen), tuition exemption, and airfare. Available through embassy or university recommendation.
requirements: Letter of acceptance from Japanese professor

name: JASSO Student Exchange Support Program (Scholarship for Short-term Study)
description: Short-term scholarship for exchange students studying in Japan for 8 days to 1 year. Provides monthly stipend of 80,000 yen but does not cover tuition. Must apply through home university's exchange agreement.
requirements: Return to home country after program

name: ADB-Japan Scholarship Program
description: Full scholarship for students from ADB member countries to pursue master's degrees in economics, management, science and technology at participating institutions in Asia-Pacific. Covers tuition, monthly allowance, housing, books, and travel. Recipients must return to home country after graduation.

name: Korean Government KGSP Scholarship (Undergraduate)
description: Full undergraduate scholarship including 1 year Korean language training, 4 years tuition, monthly stipend (500,000 won), arrival allowance, and airfare. For international students under 25 years old. Over 170 universities participate.

name: Korean Government KGSP Scholarship (Graduate)
description: Graduate scholarship for master's and doctoral programs including Korean language training, full tuition, monthly allowance (900,000-1,000,000 won), research support, and airfare. Can apply through embassy or university track.

name: POSCO Asia Fellowship
description: Doctoral fellowship for Asian students in science, engineering, and humanities at Korean universities. Covers full tuition, monthly stipend, research expenses, and settlement allowance. Highly competitive with strong focus on research excellence.

name: Hyundai Motor Chung Mong-Koo Global Scholarship
description: Premium scholarship for outstanding international students pursuing graduate degrees at top Korean universities. Provides generous monthly stipend, full tuition, insurance, and research funds. Focus on future global leaders.

name: Samsung Global Scholarship Program
description: Scholarship for international graduate students at top Korean universities in technology, business, and related fields. Covers full tuition, living expenses, and internship opportunities at Samsung. Highly competitive program.

name: Seoul National University GSIS Scholarship
provider: Seoul National University Graduate School of International Studies
description: Full scholarship for international students pursuing master's degrees in international studies, international commerce, or international cooperation. Covers tuition and monthly stipend with possible full or partial funding based on merit.

name: KAIST International Student Scholarship
provider: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology
description: Full scholarship for international doctoral students in science and engineering at one of Korea's top technical universities. Includes tuition waiver, monthly stipend, medical insurance, and research assistant positions.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC)
description: Comprehensive scholarship program covering undergraduate, master's, and doctoral studies at Chinese universities. Provides tuition waiver, monthly stipend (2,500-3,500 RMB), accommodation, and medical insurance. Multiple application channels available.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship - Bilateral Program
description: Scholarship for students nominated by sending countries in accordance with bilateral educational exchange agreements. Covers all major expenses including tuition, accommodation, medical insurance, and monthly allowance.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship - University Program
description: Scholarships offered by designated Chinese universities to recruit outstanding international students. Each university has quota and admission authority. Covers tuition, accommodation, stipend, and medical insurance.

name: Confucius Institute Scholarship
description: Scholarship supporting international students, scholars, and Chinese language teachers to study in China. Programs range from 4 weeks to 4 years, focusing on Chinese language and culture studies. Covers tuition, accommodation, and monthly stipend.
requirements: Basic Chinese proficiency for some programs

name: Yenching Academy Scholarship
description: Fully-funded master's program in China Studies at Peking University for emerging leaders worldwide. Covers tuition, housing, meals, travel, field study, conference funding, and stipend. Interdisciplinary program with international cohort.
requirements: Under 29 years old at program start

name: Tsinghua University Graduate Scholarship
description: Comprehensive scholarship for international graduate students at China's top technical university. Covers tuition waiver, accommodation, and monthly stipend. Various levels of funding available based on academic merit.

name: Peking University Presidential Scholarship
description: Premium scholarship for exceptional international doctoral students at Peking University. Provides full tuition waiver, accommodation, comprehensive medical insurance, and generous monthly stipend. Highly competitive with merit-based selection.

name: Shanghai Government Scholarship
description: Scholarship for international students studying at Shanghai universities at all levels. Provides partial to full tuition coverage and/or monthly stipend depending on scholarship category (A, B, or C). Administered through individual universities.
requirements: Age requirements vary by degree level

name: Fudan University International Student Scholarship
description: Multiple scholarship categories for international students at one of China's top universities. Ranges from partial to full funding including tuition, accommodation, and stipend. Available for all degree levels.

name: Zhejiang University International Student Scholarship
description: Comprehensive scholarship program for international students at all levels at ZJU. Offers various categories including full scholarship (tuition, accommodation, stipend) and partial scholarships. Strong focus on STEM fields.

name: Nanjing University Jasmine Scholarship
description: Full scholarship for outstanding international students at Nanjing University covering undergraduate through doctoral levels. Includes tuition waiver, free accommodation, monthly allowance, and medical insurance.

name: Osaka University Graduate Scholarship for International Students
description: Scholarship for international graduate students at Osaka University, one of Japan's Imperial Universities. Provides tuition exemption and monthly stipend. Multiple scholarship categories available including university, JASSO, and private foundation scholarships.
requirements: Acceptance to Osaka University graduate program

name: University of Tokyo Graduate Student Special Scholarship
description: Partial scholarship for international graduate students at Japan's top university. Covers tuition exemption and/or monthly stipend depending on category. Additional scholarships available through individual graduate schools and research fellowships.

name: Kyoto University MEXT Scholarship (University Recommendation)
description: University-recommended track of MEXT scholarship for doctoral students at Kyoto University. Provides full tuition exemption, monthly stipend (145,000 yen), and no entrance fees. Requires prior acceptance by Kyoto University supervisor.

name: Keio University Graduate School Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for international graduate students at Keio University's various graduate schools. Offers tuition reduction and/or stipend support. Amount and coverage vary by graduate school and student performance.

name: Tohoku University President Fellowship
description: Prestigious fellowship for exceptional international doctoral students at Tohoku University. Covers full tuition, entrance fees, and generous monthly stipend. Aims to support future research leaders in various fields.

name: Korean Government Support Program for Foreign Exchange Students
description: Support program for short-term exchange students studying in Korea for one or two semesters. Provides monthly living allowance (500,000-600,000 won) but does not cover tuition. Must apply through partner university exchange agreement.
requirements: Return to home university after exchange

name: Chinese University of Hong Kong Postgraduate Studentship
description: Full scholarship for research postgraduate students (MPhil/PhD) at CUHK. Covers tuition and provides monthly stipend of HK$18,390 for PhD students. All admitted research students automatically considered for studentship.

name: Australian Awards Scholarships
provider: Australian Government Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade
description: Long-term development scholarships for students from developing countries in the Indo-Pacific region. Covers tuition, living expenses, airfare, and health insurance. Aims to contribute to development needs of partner countries.
requirements: Commit to returning home for 2 years

name: Endeavour Postgraduate Leadership Award
description: Merit-based scholarships for international students to undertake postgraduate study in Australia. Covers travel, tuition, living allowance, and health insurance. Available for 2-3.5 year programs.
requirements: Not hold Australian citizenship or permanent residency

name: University of Adelaide Global Citizens Scholarship
description: Tuition fee scholarships for high-achieving international undergraduate students. Provides 15%-30% tuition fee reduction for duration of program. Based on academic excellence and leadership potential.
requirements: Not available with other major scholarships

name: University of Sydney International Scholarship
description: Competitive scholarships providing partial to full tuition fee coverage for exceptional international students. Available for undergraduate and postgraduate coursework. Based on academic merit.
requirements: Demonstrate financial need for some categories

name: Melbourne Research Scholarships
description: Comprehensive support for graduate research students including domestic and international applicants. Covers living allowance, relocation grant, and fee remission for PhD students. Highly competitive based on research excellence.

name: New Zealand ASEAN Scholarships
description: Undergraduate scholarships for students from ASEAN member countries. Covers tuition, living costs, travel, and insurance for up to three years. Aims to build leadership capacity in Southeast Asia.

name: New Zealand Commonwealth Scholarship
provider: New Zealand Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade
description: Postgraduate scholarships for students from Commonwealth developing countries. Fully funded including tuition, living allowance, travel, and insurance. Priority for development-related fields.

name: University of Auckland International Student Excellence Scholarship
description: Partial tuition scholarships for outstanding international undergraduate students. Awards up to NZ$10,000 per year for degree duration. Based on academic excellence from secondary school.

name: NUS Graduate Scholarship for ASEAN Nationals
description: PhD scholarships specifically for ASEAN nationals pursuing research degrees. Covers full tuition, monthly stipend, conference allowance, and one-time airfare. Requires teaching or research duties.

name: NUS Global Merit Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarships for outstanding international undergraduate students. Covers tuition and provides living allowance for 4 years. Includes opportunities for summer programs and leadership development.
requirements: Bond to work in Singapore for 3 years

name: NTU University Scholars Programme
description: Prestigious scholarship for top international students with exceptional academic and leadership records. Covers tuition fees, living allowance, hostel, and travel grant. Includes enrichment opportunities.

name: NTU Research Scholarship
description: Full scholarships for doctoral research students at NTU. Covers tuition fees, monthly stipend, conference allowance, and thesis support. Open to international students with strong research potential.

name: Singapore International Graduate Award (SINGA)
provider: Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR)
description: Collaborative PhD scholarship between A*STAR, NUS, NTU, and SUTD for international students. Covers tuition, generous monthly stipend, airfare, and settling-in allowance. Focus on science and engineering research.

name: SMU Global Impact Scholarship
description: Full scholarship covering tuition, living allowance, accommodation, and travel for outstanding ASEAN students. Includes summer programs and global exposure opportunities. Emphasis on leadership and community impact.

name: Hong Kong PhD Fellowship Scheme
description: Prestigious fellowship for highly qualified PhD students worldwide. Provides monthly stipend of HK$27,600 and conference travel allowance for up to 4 years. Highly competitive, approximately 300 awards annually.
requirements: Admission to Hong Kong university PhD program

name: Hong Kong University Full Postgraduate Studentship
description: Full studentship for research postgraduate students covering tuition and providing monthly stipend. Available for MPhil and PhD programs across all disciplines. Competitive selection based on academic merit.
requirements: First or upper second class honors

name: HKUST RedBird PhD Award
provider: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
description: Enhanced PhD fellowship providing top-up to standard stipend for outstanding research students. Covers tuition with generous monthly allowance up to HK$30,000. Includes conference and research travel support.

name: Chinese University of Hong Kong Scholarship
description: Postgraduate studentships for research degree students covering tuition fees and living stipend. Available across all faculties for MPhil and PhD programs. Additional top-up awards available for exceptional candidates.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees
description: Prestigious international master's programs delivered by consortia of European universities. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and monthly allowance. Study in at least two European countries during the program.
requirements: Not resided in EU for more than 12 months in last 5 years for some categories

name: Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions Doctoral Networks
description: European PhD training networks with living allowance, mobility allowance, and family allowance where applicable. Includes secondments to other institutions and industry partners. Focus on innovative research training.
requirements: Transnational mobility (not resided in recruiting country >12 months)

name: DAAD Scholarships for Development-Related Postgraduate Courses
description: Scholarships for professionals from developing countries for development-related master's programs. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, travel, health insurance, and German language course. Requires work experience.
requirements: Return to home country after studies

name: DAAD Research Grants - Doctoral Programmes in Germany
description: Funding for international doctoral candidates to complete PhD in Germany. Provides monthly stipend, health insurance, travel allowance, and study/research allowance. Up to 4 years support.
requirements: Not resided in Germany for >15 months

name: Dutch Government Holland Scholarship
provider: Netherlands Ministry of Education, Culture and Science
description: One-time scholarship of €5,000 for international students from outside European Economic Area. Meant as contribution to living expenses for Bachelor's or Master's programs. Awarded by participating Dutch institutions.

name: Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals
description: Comprehensive scholarships for developing country nationals for master's studies in Sweden. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and insurance. Targets future leaders with work experience.
requirements: Return to home country with Swedish experience

name: Commonwealth Scholarship and Fellowship Plan
description: Scholarships for students from low and middle-income Commonwealth countries. Covers airfare, tuition, and stipend for master's or PhD studies. Themed around development impact and UK development priorities.

name: KAUST Fellowship
provider: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology
description: Full fellowship for all admitted graduate students at KAUST covering tuition, living stipend, housing, and medical insurance. Open to all nationalities for STEM programs. No citizenship restrictions apply.

name: Khalifa University Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for Emirati and international students covering tuition, stipend, accommodation, and health insurance. Focus on engineering, science, and technology programs. Highly competitive selection process.

name: MBZUAI Graduate Fellowship
provider: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence
description: Full fellowship for all admitted AI students covering tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, health insurance, and travel. World's first graduate-level AI university. Open to international applicants with strong technical background.
requirements: Bachelor's/Master's in computer science or related field

name: Mandela Rhodes Scholarships
description: Prestigious scholarship for young African leaders pursuing postgraduate studies at partner South African universities. Covers tuition, living expenses, and leadership development. Emphasizes reconciliation, education, entrepreneurship, and leadership.

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
description: Comprehensive scholarship for academically talented yet economically disadvantaged young Africans. Covers tuition, accommodation, books, and leadership development at partner universities across Africa and globally. Focuses on transformational leadership.
requirements: Commitment to giving back to Africa

name: OAS-GCUB Scholarship Program
description: Academic scholarships for OAS member state citizens to study in the Americas. Covers partial tuition and some expenses. Promotes development through higher education and must return to home country after completion.

name: Brazilian Government CNPq Scholarships
provider: CNPq - National Council for Scientific and Technological Development
description: Research scholarships for Brazilian nationals and some international students for graduate studies in Brazil and abroad. Primarily supports science and technology research. Monthly stipends provided for living expenses.

name: CAPES Scholarships
provider: Brazilian Federal Agency for Support and Evaluation of Graduate Education
description: Graduate scholarships for Brazilian students and visiting researchers. Supports research and graduate education across all academic fields. Provides monthly stipends for domestic and international study programs.

name: Chile Government Scholarships (Becas Chile)
description: Government-funded scholarships for Chilean students to pursue graduate degrees abroad and for international students to study in Chile. Covers tuition, living expenses, and health insurance. Requires return to Chile after completion.
requirements: Chilean citizenship or admission to Chilean institution

name: CONACyT Mexico Scholarships
provider: National Council of Science and Technology Mexico
description: National scholarships for Mexican students pursuing graduate degrees in Mexico and abroad. Monthly stipends for living expenses with focus on science, technology, and priority areas. Promotes national development through advanced education.

name: African Development Bank Scholarships
description: Scholarships for African nationals to pursue master's degrees in development-related fields at African universities. Covers tuition, travel, books, living expenses, and health insurance. Aims to build Africa's human capital.

name: Turkish Government Scholarships (Türkiye Bursları)
description: Government scholarships for international students including from Middle East, Africa, and Latin America. Covers tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, Turkish language course, and health insurance. One of the world's most comprehensive scholarship programs.

name: Qatar University Scholarships
description: Merit and need-based scholarships for Qatari and international students. Covers tuition and may include stipends and accommodation. Various categories including academic excellence, athletics, and special talents.

name: African Union Scholarships
description: Scholarships for African students to study at African universities and institutions. Part of Pan-African University and other AU education initiatives. Promotes intra-African mobility and continental integration.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship Programme
description: Need-based scholarships (50% grant, 50% loan) for outstanding students from select developing countries for postgraduate studies. Priority to students from East Africa, Middle East, and South/Central Asia. Focus on those with no other funding means.

name: The Next Einstein Forum (NEF) Fellows Program
description: Fellowship for young African researchers and innovators in STEM fields. Provides visibility, networking, and support for research. Fellows are showcased at NEF Global Gatherings. Aims to elevate Africa's scientific talent.

name: Islamic Development Bank Scholarships
description: Merit-based scholarships for students from IsDB member countries to pursue graduate studies in priority development fields. Covers tuition, travel, living stipend, and books. Recipients must return to home country to contribute to development.

name: TWAS-UNESCO Associateship Scheme
description: Fellowships for scientists from developing countries including Africa, Middle East, and Latin America to visit research centers. Supports research stays at centers of excellence. Promotes South-South cooperation in science.
requirements: Regular research position in home country

name: Manaaki New Zealand Scholarships (for Latin America & Africa)
description: Government scholarships for students from eligible Latin American and African countries to study in New Zealand. Covers tuition, living costs, travel, and insurance. Aims to build leadership and strengthen bilateral relationships.

name: Chevening MENA Scholarships
description: Prestigious UK government scholarships for emerging leaders from Middle East and North Africa. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and provides networking opportunities. One-year master's programs at UK universities.
requirements: Return to home country for 2 years

name: African Women in Agricultural Research and Development (AWARD) Fellowship
description: Career development fellowship for African women scientists in agricultural research. Provides training, mentoring, and small research grants. Two-year program combining science and leadership training. Builds Africa's pipeline of women agricultural leaders.

name: RUFORUM Scholarships
provider: Regional Universities Forum for Capacity Building in Agriculture
description: Graduate scholarships for African students in agriculture and related sciences at RUFORUM member universities. Covers tuition, research costs, and stipends. Focuses on building Africa's agricultural research capacity.

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program (MENA & LAC regions)
description: U.S. government scholarships for graduate students from around the world including Middle East, Africa, and Latin America. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and health insurance. Promotes mutual understanding through educational exchange.

name: Schlumberger Foundation Faculty for the Future Fellowships
description: Fellowships for women from developing and emerging economies to pursue PhD or postdoctoral research in STEM at leading institutions worldwide. Provides up to $50,000 annually. Aims to generate conditions for women to flourish in STEM careers.

name: American University of Beirut Scholarships
description: Merit and need-based scholarships for international and regional students. Comprehensive financial aid including full scholarships, partial tuition coverage, and work-study. One of the Middle East's premier universities with generous aid programs.

name: Mohammed VI Polytechnic University Scholarships
description: Scholarships for African and international students in engineering, agriculture, business, and sciences. Covers tuition and living expenses at Morocco's leading research university. Focus on African development and innovation.

name: Rhodes Scholarships (Middle East & Africa constituencies)
description: World's oldest international scholarship program for study at Oxford University. Available for select Middle Eastern and African countries. Covers all expenses plus stipend for 2-3 years. Seeks exceptional all-rounders with leadership potential.

name: African Economic Research Consortium (AERC) Collaborative PhD Program
description: PhD training program in economics for African students at African universities. Covers tuition, research costs, and stipends. Combines coursework at AERC-approved universities with research support. Builds Africa's economics research capacity.
requirements: Master's degree in Economics or related field

name: Séneca Scholarship - FUNIBER
description: Partial scholarships (25-75% tuition reduction) for online master's programs for students from Latin America, Africa, and other regions. Covers various fields including business, education, health, and engineering. Flexible online learning format.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
provider: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation / University of Cambridge
description: Full scholarship for outstanding applicants from outside the UK to pursue postgraduate degrees at Cambridge. Covers full tuition, living stipend, airfare, and family allowance. Selection based on academic excellence, leadership potential, and commitment to improving lives.

name: Rhodes Scholarship
description: Prestigious scholarship for exceptional students worldwide to study at Oxford University. Covers tuition, living expenses, and travel. Selection emphasizes academic excellence, character, leadership, and commitment to service.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship
description: 50% scholarship and 50% loan for postgraduate studies for outstanding students from select developing countries. Priority to students with no other means of financing. Selection based on academic merit, financial need, and development commitment.

name: Chevening Scholarship
description: UK government's global scholarship programme for future leaders to pursue one-year master's degrees. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and other allowances. Scholars must return to home country for minimum two years after studies.

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
description: Enables graduate students, young professionals and artists from abroad to study and conduct research in the US. Covers tuition, airfare, living stipend, and health insurance. Deadline and eligibility vary by country.

name: DAAD Scholarships
description: Various scholarship programs for international students to study in Germany. Includes monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel allowance. Multiple programs available including Development-Related Postgraduate Courses and Research Grants.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees
description: Prestigious integrated study programmes delivered by consortia of European universities. Scholarships cover tuition, travel, installation costs, and monthly stipend. Students study in at least two European countries and receive joint/double/multiple degrees.

name: Joint Japan/World Bank Graduate Scholarship Program
description: Provides scholarships for students from developing countries to pursue development-related master's degrees at participating universities worldwide. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and health insurance. Scholars must return to home country after graduation.

name: Open Society Foundations Scholarships
description: Various scholarship programs supporting students from marginalized communities and underrepresented backgrounds. Programs focus on human rights, public health, and social justice. Covers tuition and living expenses.

name: Islamic Development Bank Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for outstanding students from IsDB member countries to pursue postgraduate studies in development-related fields. Covers tuition, living expenses, books, and travel. Recipients must return to home country after completion.

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
description: Comprehensive scholarship for academically talented young people from Africa with demonstrated financial need. Covers tuition, accommodation, books, travel, and includes mentoring and leadership development. Partner universities across Africa, North America, and other regions.

name: Commonwealth Scholarship
description: UK government scholarships for students from low and middle-income Commonwealth countries. Covers airfare, tuition, and living stipend. Six scholarship plans available focusing on different development themes and career stages.

name: Boustany Foundation MBA Scholarship
description: Partial scholarships for outstanding students to pursue MBA at Harvard Business School or University of Cambridge Judge Business School. Includes two-week internship at Boustany Foundation. Selection based on academic excellence, leadership, and commitment.
requirements: Admission to HBS or Cambridge Judge

name: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship
provider: French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs
description: Scholarship for international students to study engineering, economics, law, or political science in France. Provides monthly allowance, travel, health insurance, and cultural activities. French institutions nominate candidates.

name: Australia Awards Scholarships
description: Long-term development awards for students from Indo-Pacific region to study in Australia. Covers full tuition, return air travel, establishment allowance, and living expenses. Recipients must return home for two years after study.

name: Orange Knowledge Programme
description: Scholarships for professionals from 54 countries to study or train in Netherlands. Focus on development-related fields. Covers tuition, travel, living allowance, insurance, and visa. Applicants must be nominated by employers.

name: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarships
description: Prestigious doctoral scholarship attracting world-class students to Canada. Provides $50,000 CAD per year for three years. Canadian institutions nominate candidates. Selection based on academic excellence, research potential, and leadership.

name: Wallenberg Foundation Postdoctoral Scholarship
description: Postdoctoral scholarship for Swedish PhD graduates to conduct research abroad at leading universities. Provides generous funding for 1-3 years including salary, travel, and research costs. Aims to support Sweden's most promising researchers.

name: UNESCO/Poland Co-Sponsored Fellowships Programme
description: Fellowships for students and young professionals from developing countries to study in UNESCO priority areas in Poland. Provides monthly stipend and tuition support. Focus on fields relevant to UNESCO's mission.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship
description: Multiple scholarship programs for international students to study in China. Covers tuition, accommodation, living stipend, and comprehensive medical insurance. Various categories including bilateral programs and university-specific scholarships.

name: Forté Foundation MBA Fellowships
description: Scholarships for outstanding women pursuing MBA degrees at Forté member schools. Awards range from $10,000-$40,000. Focus on supporting women's advancement in business leadership. Specific deadlines vary by partner school.

name: Knight-Hennessy Scholars
description: Multi-disciplinary graduate scholarship at Stanford University supporting future global leaders. Covers tuition, stipend, travel, and leadership development programming. Scholars join cohort-based community with mentorship and global experiences.

name: Inter-American Development Bank Scholarships
description: Graduate scholarships for citizens of IDB member countries to pursue studies in development-related fields. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, health insurance, and travel. Recipients must return to home country and work in development sector.

name: Civil Society Leadership Awards
description: Competitive awards for individuals pursuing advocacy, activism, or social justice work to pursue graduate studies. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel, and provides re-entry support. Focus on supporting civil society leaders from marginalized communities.

name: Turkiye Scholarships
description: Comprehensive government scholarship for international students to study in Turkey at all levels. Covers tuition, accommodation, health insurance, monthly stipend, Turkish language course, and airfare. One of the world's most generous scholarship programs.

name: Reach Oxford Scholarship
description: Full scholarship for undergraduate students from low-income countries who cannot study in their own country. Covers course fees, living expenses, and one return airfare per year. Highly competitive with priority to students facing exceptional obstacles.

name: Google Lime Scholarship
description: For students with disabilities pursuing computer science or related technical fields. Provides financial support, networking opportunities, and Google mentorship. Recipients demonstrate strong academic performance and leadership.
requirements: Enrolled in CS or related field

name: Microsoft Tuition Scholarship
description: For students from underrepresented communities pursuing computer science, engineering, or related STEM degrees. Partial tuition scholarship with potential internship opportunities at Microsoft. Renewable for multiple years.
requirements: Underrepresented minority or other underrepresented group

name: Adobe Research Women-in-Technology Scholarship
description: Supports outstanding female undergraduate and master's students studying computer science. Includes financial award, Adobe mentorship, and potential internship. Focus on technical innovation and leadership potential.

name: IBM PhD Fellowship
description: Prestigious fellowship for exceptional PhD students in AI, quantum computing, cloud, security, and other strategic IBM research areas. Provides stipend, tuition, and mentorship from IBM researchers. Highly competitive with global reach.
requirements: Research aligned with IBM focus areas
At least 1 year remaining in PhD program

name: Bosch PhD Scholarship
description: For doctoral candidates working on interdisciplinary research projects with societal relevance. Covers living expenses and research costs. Emphasis on connecting science with practical applications.

name: Siemens Excellence Awards
description: Recognizes outstanding students in engineering, technology, and sciences. Provides financial support and networking with Siemens professionals. Focus on innovation and technical excellence.

name: Generation Google Scholarship
description: For students from underrepresented groups in computer science. Available in multiple regions including US, Canada, Europe, Asia. Covers tuition and provides Google community membership.

name: IEEE Presidents' Scholarship
description: For undergraduate engineering and computer science students demonstrating academic excellence and IEEE involvement. Renewable award recognizing contributions to IEEE student activities.

name: ACM SIGHPC/Intel Computational & Data Science Fellowship
description: Supports women and underrepresented groups pursuing graduate studies in data science, HPC, or related fields. Includes travel grant for conference attendance and mentorship opportunities.

name: Schmidt Science Fellows
description: Postdoctoral program for exceptional scientists to pursue interdisciplinary research. Provides generous stipend, travel, and research funds for one-year pivot into new field. Highly selective global program.
requirements: PhD in natural sciences, engineering, or mathematics

name: IBRO-PERC African Regional Committee Scholarships
description: For African neuroscience students to attend training programs, workshops, and pursue graduate studies. Supports capacity building in neuroscience research across Africa.

name: Deloitte Foundation Scholarship
description: For students pursuing accounting, business, or related fields with demonstrated leadership and academic excellence. Connects recipients with Deloitte mentorship and career opportunities.

name: McKinsey Emerging Scholars Program
description: For outstanding Black and Hispanic undergraduate students interested in business careers. Includes scholarship, internship, mentorship, and professional development programming over multiple years.

name: BCG Women's Scholarship
description: For outstanding female students interested in consulting careers. Includes financial award, interview preparation, and networking with BCG consultants. Available in multiple countries.

name: Google PhD Fellowship
description: For exceptional PhD students in computer science and related fields conducting research aligned with Google's interests. Covers stipend and tuition, includes Google mentor, and conference travel.

name: IEEE Power & Energy Society Scholarship
description: For students pursuing electrical engineering with focus on power and energy systems. Multiple awards available annually for undergraduate and graduate students.

name: Microsoft Research PhD Fellowship
description: Two-year fellowship for exceptional PhD students in computing-related fields. Covers tuition and provides generous stipend plus research funds. Includes Microsoft Research mentorship and internship opportunities.

name: Adobe Design Circle Scholarship
description: For creative students from underrepresented communities pursuing design, UX, or related fields. Includes Creative Cloud subscription, mentorship, and Adobe community access.

name: Siemens Competition Awards
provider: Siemens Foundation (now absorbed into Science Talent Search)
description: Part of Regeneron Science Talent Search, recognizing exceptional high school seniors for scientific research. Awards support undergraduate STEM education at any accredited institution.

name: ACM SIGAI/AAAI Doctoral Consortium Travel Scholarship
description: Travel and registration support for PhD students in artificial intelligence to attend AAAI conference. Provides mentorship from senior AI researchers and networking opportunities.

name: AWS AI & ML Scholarship
description: For students from underrepresented groups interested in AI and machine learning. Includes Udacity nanodegree program and AWS training credits. Top performers receive full nanodegree scholarship.

name: Palantir Women in Technology Scholarship
description: For female students studying computer science or related technical fields. Includes scholarship, mentorship, and potential internship opportunity at Palantir. Multiple regional programs available.

name: IEEE Communications Society Graduate Student Fellowships
description: For PhD students conducting research in communications and networking. Recognizes outstanding research contributions and academic achievement in telecommunications fields.

name: Intel Scholarship
description: Multiple scholarship programs for students from underrepresented groups in computer science, engineering, and technology. Partners with organizations like UNCF and Society of Women Engineers.

name: KPMG Future Leaders Program Scholarship
description: For high-achieving minority students interested in accounting or business careers. Multi-year scholarship with internship opportunities, mentorship, and professional development.

name: Oracle Academy Student Scholarships
description: For students pursuing computer science degrees, with focus on database technologies and software development. Includes Oracle certification training and potential internship opportunities.

name: Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship
description: Two-year fellowship for PhD student teams conducting innovative research in wireless communications, AI, robotics, and related fields. Includes mentorship from Qualcomm engineers.

name: Nvidia Graduate Fellowship
description: For exceptional PhD students conducting research in AI, computer graphics, computer architecture, or related areas. Provides financial support and Nvidia mentorship for one academic year.

name: SAP Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: For students with disabilities pursuing business, IT, or STEM degrees. Part of SAP's commitment to neurodiversity and inclusion. Includes mentorship and networking opportunities.

name: ACM-W Scholarship for Attendance at Research Conferences
provider: ACM Council on Women in Computing
description: Travel grants for women in computing to attend ACM-sponsored research conferences. Supports participation in technical programs and networking with researchers. Multiple awards available throughout the year.
